why_this_action.summary: Respected the active measurement-hold cooldown instead of resetting it with another short-window hold execution, and refreshed one consolidated execution board for the live manual lanes. Re-surfaced the current StackOverflow handoff asset so the hold window still points at a concrete demand-capture move. Refreshed stale manual execution packets for the live prepared queues during the hold window.
